scripts.db:init: sh -c 'docker exec digital-wallet-postgres psql -U wallet -d postgres -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = '\''digital_wallet'\''" | grep -q 1 || docker exec digital-wallet-postgres psql -U wallet -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE digital_wallet"; docker exec -i digital-wallet-postgres psql -U wallet -d digital_wallet < packages/db/schema.sql'
scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait'
scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'npm run db:start && sleep 3 && npm run db:init && npm run dev:all'
